barrows gloves.note: Bought from the Culinaromancer's Chest for 130k after completing all of Recipe for Disaster

dragon gloves.note: Bought from the Culinaromancer's Chest as Recipe for Disaster subquests are completed

rune gloves.note: Bought from the Culinaromancer's Chest as Recipe for Disaster subquests are completed

adamant gloves.note: Bought from the Culinaromancer's Chest as Recipe for Disaster subquests are completed

mithril gloves.note: Bought from the Culinaromancer's Chest as Recipe for Disaster subquests are completed

iban's staff.note: Taken from Iban at the end of Underground Pass; casts Iban Blast

iban's staff (u).note: Iban's staff upgraded by the Dark Mage in West Ardougne for 200k

rod of ivandis.note: Created during In Aid of the Myreque; silver weapon, kills tier 2 vampyres

ivandis flail.note: Created during A Taste of Hope from a chain, an enchanted emerald sickle (b) and the rod of Ivandis

blisterwood sickle.note: Made from blisterwood logs and an enchanted ruby sickle (b) during Sins of the Father

blisterwood flail.note: Ivandis flail combined with a blisterwood sickle during Sins of the Father

sunspear.note: Reward after The Blood Moon Rises; reclaimable from Efaritay's Supplies for 100k

silverlight.note: From Sir Prysin during Demon Slayer; demonbane and silver weapon

darklight.note: Silverlight transformed by Agrith-Naar's blood at the end of Shadow of the Storm

arclight.note: Darklight (Shadow of the Storm reward) enhanced with 3 ancient shards at the Catacombs altar

excalibur.note: From the Lady of the Lake during Merlin's Crystal; hard Seers' Village diary enhances its special

ancient mace.note: Acquired during the quest; tradeable but wielding requires quest completion

keris.note: Dropped by the Giant Scarab at the end of Contact!; bonus damage vs kalphites and scabarites

keris partisan.note: Reward from Maisa; extra partisans sold by Selim in Al Kharid for 60k

wolfbane.note: From Drezel after Priest in Peril; silver dagger with a prayer bonus

barrelchest anchor.note: Dropped broken by Barrelchest during the quest; Smith repairs it for 230k

ava's attractor.note: Animal Magnetism reward when below 50 Ranged

ava's assembler.note: Accumulator upgraded with Vorkath's head after Dragon Slayer II

crystal bow.note: Reward choice (500 charges); also sung from a crystal weapon seed, quest required to wield

crystal shield.note: Reward choice (500 charges); also sung from a crystal weapon seed, quest required to wield

magic secateurs.note: From Malignius Mortifer during the quest; the only weapon that damages Tanglefoot

salve amulet.note: Made from a salve shard mined in the Abandoned Mine after Haunted Mine

holy book.note: Damaged book from the quest reward casket; completing it needs 4 Saradomin pages from clues

unholy book.note: Damaged book from the quest reward casket; completing it needs 4 Zamorak pages from clues

book of balance.note: Damaged book from the quest reward casket; completing it needs 4 Guthix pages from clues

book of war.note: Damaged book bought from Jossik for 5k after the quest; needs 4 Bandos pages from clues

book of law.note: Damaged book bought from Jossik for 5k after the quest; needs 4 Armadyl pages from clues

book of darkness.note: Damaged book bought from Jossik for 5k after the quest; needs 4 Ancient pages from clues

book of the dead.note: Reward from A Kingdom Divided; required for Arceuus resurrection spells

ring of shadows.quest: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire
ring of shadows.note: Reward from Desert Treasure II; upgraded ring of visibility with offensive stats

chaos gauntlets.note: Available after Family Crest; +3 max hit on bolt spells

v's shield.note: Created during The Fremennik Exiles; acts as a mirror shield with better stats

helm of neitiznot.note: Awarded on completing The Fremennik Isles; tradeable but requires the quest to wear

gnome amulet.note: Reward from King Bolren after Tree Gnome Village
